title: Brazilian Chicken Casserole
description: A delicious and easy-to-make casserole dish that combines the flavors of Brazil with the comfort of chicken and cheese. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: 1 1/2 pounds boneless, skinless chicken breast or thighs

instructions: 2. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add the sliced bell peppers and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
5. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
6. Stir in the cumin and shredded cheese.
7. Transfer the chicken mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
8. If using, drizzle the casserole cream over the top of the chicken mixture.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
